levels.name: Beginner
levels.description: First steps — getting familiar with what Claude can do

levels.name: Explorer
levels.description: Curious and experimenting — trying features and building habits

levels.name: Practitioner
levels.description: Claude is part of the daily toolkit — confident and consistent use

levels.name: Expert
levels.description: Deep fluency — shaping how Claude works, not just using it

levels.name: Champion
levels.description: Building team infrastructure — making everyone else better with AI

milestones.text: Asked Claude a question and used the answer in their work
Used Claude to draft or revise written content (email, doc, message)
Uploaded a file or image for Claude to analyse or work with
Iterated on a response — gave feedback, asked follow-ups, or corrected Claude
Used Claude to summarise or extract key points from a long document
Wrote a structured prompt with explicit context, constraints, or examples
Used Claude to prepare for a meeting, presentation, or decision
Connected and actively used an integration (Slack, Drive, Gmail, Calendar)
Used web search or deep research mode to gather current information
Uses Claude as part of their daily workflow — not just occasionally
Used built-in skills to create a document, spreadsheet, or presentation
Built an interactive artifact or small app with Claude
Set up a Project with custom instructions to tailor Claude for a recurring task
Used Claude to analyse data and produce charts, dashboards, or visual outputs
Completed a multi-step workflow across tools (e.g. research → doc → email)
Modified system instructions or custom context to meaningfully change Claude's behaviour
Used the Anthropic API directly (via SDK, curl, or Claude Code)
Built a multi-file application or tool with Claude's assistance
Used MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to connect Claude to external services
Debugged a failing interaction by adjusting prompts, context, or architecture
Identified and implemented a use case that saved measurable time
Written and published a custom skill for the team to use in Claude
Deployed a Claude-powered tool or app to Vercel for team or external access
Created or modified the team onboarding process to include AI adoption training
Built and maintained a shared prompt library or template repository for the org
Set up a CI/CD pipeline incorporating Claude (e.g. Claude Code in GitHub Actions)
Ran a workshop, lunch-and-learn, or training session on Claude for colleagues
Configured and managed MCP servers or integrations at the organisation level
Measured and reported on AI adoption metrics or ROI for their team
Contributed to an internal SDK, wrapper, or abstraction layer over the Anthropic API
